description: Digg: tail the AI story leaderboard, GitHub feeds (stars/new/activity/recent), ranking-change history, and live ingestion pipeline events from the terminal. Read-only.

tools.name: feed_raw
tools.description: Fetch the raw /ai HTML page. The CLI's sync command parses this; most users should run `sync` then `top` instead of calling this directly. Returns the RawHTML.

tools.name: feed_story_raw
tools.description: Fetch the raw /ai/{clusterUrlId} story detail page (HTML). The CLI's `story` command parses this; users should not need to call this directly. Required: cluster_url_id. Returns the RawHTML.

params.name: cluster_url_id
params.description: Short alphanumeric cluster URL ID (8 chars), e.g. iq7usf9e

tools.name: trending_status
tools.description: Read the current pipeline status: storiesToday, clustersToday, isFetching, nextFetchAt, and the recent event stream (cluster_detected, fast_climb, post_understanding, batch_started, batch_breakdown, posts_stored, embedding_progress). Returns the TrendingStatus.

tools.name: github_stars
tools.description: Top AI repos ranked by starring activity from Digg-tracked accounts. Returns repo_full_name, language, stargazers_count, recent starrer list, breakout_score, novel_score, ai_related_score, and the model's one-sentence classification. Returns the RawHTML; structured records are extracted by the CLI from the embedded RSC payload.

params.name: min-starrers
params.description: Keep only repos starred by >= N distinct Digg-tracked accounts (reads .repo.distinct_starrers; falls back to len(.repo.starrers) when absent). Applied BEFORE --limit. 0 = no filter; must be >= 0.

tools.name: github_new
tools.description: Recently first-seen GitHub repos with the Digg-tracked creator/starrer who first put them on Digg's radar (event_id, event_created_at, repo_full_name, creator). Returns the RawHTML; CLI extracts the per-event records.

tools.name: github_activity
tools.description: Top GitHub contributor leaderboard: per-author rank, contribution count, and distinct repos count over Digg's tracking window. Returns the RawHTML; CLI extracts the leaderboard table rows.

tools.name: github_recent
tools.description: Live GitHub activity feed: per-event entries with the GitHub URL (issue/PR/commit/repo), the user who acted, and a short description of the target. Returns the RawHTML; CLI extracts the per-event tuples.

tools.name: rankings_emerging
tools.description: Curated list of small AI companies from /ai/x/rankings/companies (the 'EMERGING STARTUPS — CURATED THIS SNAPSHOT' section). ~10 rows per snapshot, refreshed daily. Mixes IsEmergingStartup-flagged accounts with adjacent new entrants. Returns RawHTML; CLI extracts structured CompanyEntry rows.

params.name: max-skip-ratio
params.description: Schema-drift tolerance: fraction of entries that may fail to decode before the command exits non-zero. Default 0.10. Range [0, 1].

tools.name: rankings_movers
tools.description: Companies whose follower count shifted most since the last rankings/companies snapshot. Two halves: --direction up = gainers, down = losers, both = both (default; direction stamped per row). Curated to ~10 entries per side.

params.name: direction
params.description: Movers direction: up | down | both (default both).

tools.name: rankings_list
tools.description: Full company ranking — the 'Companies followed by the AI 2K' section of /ai/x/rankings/companies. Server-paginated; returns the initial-HTML slice (typically 50-200 entries). Pass --limit to cap.

params.name: limit
params.description: Max rows to return from the initial-HTML slice (0 = all).
